steps.title: Spot the contrasting philosophies
steps.content: Realism emphasizes accuracy and ordinary people; romanticism (marked by “instead”) accentuates positive traits and idealizes with embellishments. These are opposed approaches.

steps.title: Choose the oppositional verb
steps.content:
”Rejected” fits the contrast—realism refused romantic conventions.

The alternatives express incompatible relationships: “imitated” (copying), “epitomized” (embodying), “extended” (continuing) all suggest agreement or continuation rather than opposition.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
